spring.narrative: 樱花初开，粉色花瓣随风飘落，清新而陌生

summer.narrative: 热与生机，岛上最旺盛的季节

autumn.narrative: 静而美，秋之转色对应情绪松动

winter.narrative: 寒冷与温暖同时存在，最治愈的视觉时刻

dusk.label: 黄昏
dusk.notes: warm orange cast; low-angle light; long shadows; golden rim on lighthouse

night.label: 夜晚
night.notes: deep blue/indigo; low saturation; lighthouse beam is primary emotional anchor
night.lighthouse_rule: visible in ALL night scenes, brightness delta >= 15% from day baseline

variants.sky_description: 淡青蓝带粉调，樱花花瓣飘散
粉橙夕阳映海面，樱花在暖光中
深蓝港湾夜色，星点疏落，灯塔远景剪影
冷蓝白天空，淡雪飘过港口
深蓝寒夜，雪花飘落港口水面，灯塔剪影

variants.special: Ch3秋季黄昏光线叙事关键时刻
Ch3秋季黄昏光线叙事关键时刻，暖橙光穿越花田
全游戏最治愈视觉时刻之一 — 冬夜温泉的光晕是整个游戏里最接近「安全」的视觉隐喻
梅花/樱花同框，春雾与温泉热气混合
神社石灯笼在春雾中暖光晕散

background_variant_entries.note: Ch6 is always night-tone by design. Day/dusk variants apply reduced brightness deltas to the deep-blue base palette.

variants.special: 萤火虫在灯台光柱边缘漂浮，像光的碎片

background_variant_entries.note: Ch6 lighthouse flickering returning; all variants show lighthouse_visible=true per Ch6 rule
Ch6 restored is the game finale; lighthouse permanently full beam. Night summer variant is the canonical ending scene.

variants.special: 游戏最终画面：光、海、风、萤火虫、夜。萤火虫密度高于Ch2，在灯台光柱旁聚集漂浮。

validation_summary.check_night_lighthouse_visible_all_scene: PASS — all 54 night variants have lighthouse_visible=true with increasing prominence Ch1→Ch6
validation_summary.check_night_brightness_delta_gte_15pct: PASS — all night variants have brightness_delta of -12% to -28% (15-28% darker than day)
validation_summary.check_winter_ch4_all_4_elements: PASS — all Ch4 winter night variants include rooftop_snow=true, snow_particles=true, enhanced_steam_x2=true, lighthouse_halo=true
validation_summary.check_summer_firefly_vfx_linked: PASS — all summer night variants reference fx_season_summer_firefly
validation_summary.check_winter_steam_vfx_linked: PASS — all winter Ch4/Ch5 variants reference fx_season_winter_steam_enhanced
validation_summary.check_ch3_autumn_dusk_narrative_moment: PASS — bg_ch3_before/restored autumn dusk has special flag
